name: P2P trading with Digital Twin coordination
description: A bi-level sequential optimization and peer-to-peer (P2P) trading model inside an energy community, featuring local electricity markets (LEM), local flexibility markets (LFM) using Direct Load Control (DLC), settlement deviation calculations, and a quota-adjusted value-sharing scheme.
objective: Minimize community and member-level energy costs while maximizing local self-consumption and fairness in benefit distribution.

symbols.name: load
symbols.definition: Individual electricity consumption of member m at time t

symbols.name: generation
symbols.definition: Individual non-shared RES generation of member m at time t

symbols.name: ToU
symbols.definition: Time-of-Use tariff applied by the supplier for grid purchases

symbols.name: FIT
symbols.definition: Feed-In Tariff applied by the supplier for grid injection

symbols.name: M
symbols.definition: Total number of members in the energy community

symbols.name: beta
symbols.definition: Price adjustment coefficient on LEM

symbols.name: G_sh
symbols.definition: Power generated by the shared community RES at time t

symbols.name: rho_m
symbols.definition: Individual quota of shared generation for member m

symbols.name: rho_EC
symbols.definition: Community-level quota from the shared generation

symbols.name: G_EC
symbols.definition: Power generated by the non-shared community RES assets at time t

symbols.name: C_EC
symbols.definition: Public community assets baseline load at time t

symbols.name: F_m
symbols.definition: Flexibility offered/used by member m at time t

symbols.name: FP_m
symbols.definition: Flexibility price at time t for member m

symbols.name: p_f_m
symbols.definition: Trading probability on LFM for member m at time t

symbols.name: D_m
symbols.definition: Estimated individual net deficit before flexibility adjustments

symbols.name: S_m
symbols.definition: Estimated individual net surplus before flexibility adjustments

symbols.name: D_EC
symbols.definition: Aggregated community net deficit before LFM

symbols.name: S_EC
symbols.definition: Aggregated community net surplus before LFM

symbols.name: Q_b
symbols.definition: The bidding quantity offered by the buyer on LEM after LFM adjustments

symbols.name: Q_s
symbols.definition: The bidding quantity offered by the seller on LEM after LFM adjustments

symbols.name: DP_m
symbols.definition: The bidding buy price for member m on LEM

symbols.name: SP_m
symbols.definition: The bidding sell price for member m on LEM

symbols.name: QD
symbols.definition: Aggregate buyers bidding quantity on LEM

symbols.name: QS
symbols.definition: Aggregate sellers bidding quantity on LEM

symbols.name: Q_LEM_b
symbols.definition: Actual matched quantity bought by member m on LEM

symbols.name: Q_LEM_s
symbols.definition: Actual matched quantity sold by member m on LEM

symbols.name: P_clearing
symbols.definition: LEM uniform market clearing price based on community state and bidding adjustments

symbols.name: Cost_m
symbols.definition: Calculated cost for member m before post-trading settlement updates

symbols.name: Rev_m
symbols.definition: Calculated revenue for member m before post-trading settlement updates

symbols.name: Nett_minus_m
symbols.definition: Member actual net-metered deficit

symbols.name: Nett_plus_m
symbols.definition: Member actual net-metered surplus

symbols.name: delta_Q_m
symbols.definition: Deviation between actual net-metered results and traded quantities on LEM

symbols.name: Cost_settled_m
symbols.definition: Settled individual cost updated with deviation penalties

symbols.name: Rev_settled_m
symbols.definition: Settled individual revenue updated with deviation profits

symbols.name: Nett_minus_EC
symbols.definition: Aggregated actual community net-metered deficit

symbols.name: Nett_plus_EC
symbols.definition: Aggregated actual community net-metered surplus

symbols.name: VS_EC_t
symbols.definition: Value Share of the energy community at hour t

symbols.name: EQ_m
symbols.definition: Equal share allocation per member at hour t

symbols.name: delta_Q_minus_sum
symbols.definition: Community sum of positive deviations (deficit contributors)

symbols.name: delta_Q_plus_sum
symbols.definition: Community sum of negative deviations (surplus contributors)

symbols.name: q_minus_m
symbols.definition: Member contribution quota to community deficit

symbols.name: q_plus_m
symbols.definition: Member contribution quota to community surplus

symbols.name: VS_m
symbols.definition: Adjusted Value Share allocation for member m

symbols.name: Payment_init
symbols.definition: Calculated baseline financial payment of member m before value sharing

symbols.name: Payment_final
symbols.definition: Final financial payment of member m after value sharing allocation

symbols.name: Cost_final
symbols.definition: Final net settled cost for member m at time t

symbols.name: Rev_final
symbols.definition: Final net settled revenue for member m at time t

symbols.name: Payment_no_EC
symbols.definition: Calculated financial payment of member m without community association

symbols.name: Gain_m
symbols.definition: Financial gain obtained by member m from joining the community

symbols.name: SSI_m
symbols.definition: Individual Self-Sufficiency Index for member m

symbols.name: SCI_m
symbols.definition: Individual Self-Consumption Index for member m

symbols.name: QI_m
symbols.definition: LEM trading index representing local market fulfillment rate

symbols.name: SSI_EC
symbols.definition: Community-wide Self-Sufficiency Index

symbols.name: SCI_EC
symbols.definition: Community-wide Self-Consumption Index

symbols.name: DLS_EC
symbols.definition: Degree of Local Sufficiency of the energy community

symbols.name: x_m
symbols.definition: Member share-adjusted yield metric used in fairness index

symbols.name: FI_EC
symbols.definition: Fairness index indicating equity of Value Share allocation

symbols.name: DP_init_m
symbols.definition: Average or initial deficit (consumption) price for member m at time t

symbols.name: SP_init_m
symbols.definition: Average or initial surplus (generation) price for member m at time t

symbols.name: Cost_0_m
symbols.definition: Initial cost after day-ahead optimization for member m

symbols.name: Rev_0_m
symbols.definition: Initial revenue after day-ahead optimization for member m

parameters.name: ToU
parameters.definition: Time-of-Use tariff applied by the supplier

parameters.name: FIT
parameters.definition: Feed-In tariff applied by the supplier

parameters.name: M
parameters.definition: Total number of members in the community

parameters.name: G_sh
parameters.definition: Hourly vector of power generated by shared RES plant

parameters.name: rho_m
parameters.definition: Vector of member proportional quotas for shared generation

parameters.name: rho_EC
parameters.definition: Proportion of shared generation allocated to public community needs

parameters.name: G_EC
parameters.definition: Vector of hourly baseline generation from public non-shared RES plant

parameters.name: C_EC
parameters.definition: Vector of hourly baseline consumption of public community entities

parameters.name: F_m
parameters.definition: Matrix of hourly flexible power allocations by members

parameters.name: p_f_m
parameters.definition: Execution probability rate of flexible commands

parameters.name: DP_init_m
parameters.definition: Average or initial deficit price for member m at time t

parameters.name: SP_init_m
parameters.definition: Average or initial surplus price for member m at time t

derived_variables.name: D_m
derived_variables.definition: max(0, load - generation - rho_m * G_sh)

derived_variables.name: S_m
derived_variables.definition: max(0, generation + rho_m * G_sh - load)

derived_variables.name: D_EC
derived_variables.definition: Community aggregate estimated net deficit

derived_variables.name: S_EC
derived_variables.definition: Community aggregate estimated net surplus

derived_variables.name: Q_b
derived_variables.definition: If community state is deficit (S_EC < D_EC), Q_b = D_m - F_m; otherwise (surplus), Q_b = D_m + F_m

derived_variables.name: Q_s
derived_variables.definition: If community state is deficit (S_EC < D_EC), Q_s = S_m + F_m; otherwise (surplus), Q_s = S_m - F_m

derived_variables.name: DP_m
derived_variables.definition: Bidding buy price dynamically generated based on community state and flexibility usage

derived_variables.name: SP_m
derived_variables.definition: Bidding sell price dynamically generated based on community state and flexibility usage

derived_variables.name: QD
derived_variables.definition: Sum over members of bidding buy quantities Q_b

derived_variables.name: QS
derived_variables.definition: Sum over members of bidding sell quantities Q_s

derived_variables.name: Q_LEM_b
derived_variables.definition: Proportionally matched buy capacity inside the LEM based on supply/demand balance

derived_variables.name: Q_LEM_s
derived_variables.definition: Proportionally matched sell capacity inside the LEM based on supply/demand balance

derived_variables.name: P_clearing
derived_variables.definition: LEM uniform cleared price determined dynamically closer to ToU in community deficit, and closer to FIT in community surplus

derived_variables.name: Cost_m
derived_variables.definition: Q_LEM_b * P_clearing + (Q_b - Q_LEM_b) * ToU + F_m * FP_m

derived_variables.name: Rev_m
derived_variables.definition: Q_LEM_s * P_clearing + (Q_s - Q_LEM_s) * FIT - F_m * FP_m

derived_variables.name: Nett_minus_m
derived_variables.definition: max(0, load - generation - rho_m * G_sh)

derived_variables.name: Nett_plus_m
derived_variables.definition: max(0, generation + rho_m * G_sh - load)

derived_variables.name: delta_Q_m
derived_variables.definition: (Nett_minus_m - Q_b) - (Nett_plus_m - Q_s)

derived_variables.name: Cost_settled_m
derived_variables.definition: Cost_m + (delta_Q_m > 0 ? delta_Q_m * ToU : 0)

derived_variables.name: Rev_settled_m
derived_variables.definition: Rev_m + (delta_Q_m < 0 ? abs(delta_Q_m) * FIT : 0)

derived_variables.name: Nett_minus_EC
derived_variables.definition: Actual net grid purchase needed for aggregate community at time t

derived_variables.name: Nett_plus_EC
derived_variables.definition: Actual net grid injection generated by aggregate community at time t

derived_variables.name: VS_EC_t
derived_variables.definition: Total financial surplus generated by internal community optimization at hour t

derived_variables.name: EQ_m
derived_variables.definition: Equal share benchmark partition VS_EC_t / M

derived_variables.name: delta_Q_minus_sum
derived_variables.definition: Sum over members of positive deviations at time t

derived_variables.name: delta_Q_plus_sum
derived_variables.definition: Sum over members of negative deviations absolute values at time t

derived_variables.name: q_minus_m
derived_variables.definition: Quota contribution to net deficit peak for member m

derived_variables.name: q_plus_m
derived_variables.definition: Quota contribution to net surplus peak for member m

derived_variables.name: VS_m
derived_variables.definition: Proportionally scaled value share based on individual deficit or surplus deviation quotas

derived_variables.name: Payment_init
derived_variables.definition: Cost_settled_m - Rev_settled_m

derived_variables.name: Payment_final
derived_variables.definition: Payment_init - VS_m

derived_variables.name: Payment_no_EC
derived_variables.definition: Nett_minus_m * ToU - Nett_plus_m * FIT

derived_variables.name: x_m
derived_variables.definition: VS_m / (generation + G_sh * rho_m)

derived_variables.name: Cost_0_m
derived_variables.definition: D_m * DP_init_m

derived_variables.name: Rev_0_m
derived_variables.definition: S_m * SP_init_m

equations.expression: D_m[t, m] = max(0.0, load[t, m] - generation[t, m] - rho_m[m] * G_sh[t])
S_m[t, m] = max(0.0, generation[t, m] + rho_m[m] * G_sh[t] - load[t, m])
D_EC[t] = sum(D_m[t, :]) + C_EC[t]
S_EC[t] = sum(S_m[t, :]) + G_EC[t] + rho_EC * G_sh[t]
Q_b[t, m] = S_EC[t] < D_EC[t] ? (D_m[t, m] - F_m[t, m]) : (D_m[t, m] + F_m[t, m])
Q_s[t, m] = S_EC[t] < D_EC[t] ? (S_m[t, m] + F_m[t, m]) : (S_m[t, m] - F_m[t, m])

DP_m[t, m] = S_EC[t] < D_EC[t] ? ((D_m[t, m] - F_m[t, m]) > 0.0 ? (D_m[t, m] * ToU[t] + p_f_m[t, m] * F_m[t, m] * FP_m[t, m]) / (D_m[t, m] - F_m[t, m]) : ToU[t]) : ((D_m[t, m] + F_m[t, m]) > 0.0 ? (D_m[t, m] * ToU[t]) / (D_m[t, m] + F_m[t, m]) : ToU[t])

SP_m[t, m] = S_EC[t] < D_EC[t] ? ((S_m[t, m] + F_m[t, m]) > 0.0 ? (S_m[t, m] * FIT[t] - p_f_m[t, m] * F_m[t, m] * FP_m[t, m]) / (S_m[t, m] + F_m[t, m]) : FIT[t]) : ((S_m[t, m] - F_m[t, m]) > 0.0 ? (S_m[t, m] * FIT[t]) / (S_m[t, m] - F_m[t, m]) : FIT[t])
QD[t] = sum(Q_b[t, :])
QS[t] = sum(Q_s[t, :])
Q_LEM_b[t, m] = QD[t] > 0.0 ? min(Q_b[t, m], Q_b[t, m] * QS[t] / QD[t]) : 0.0
Q_LEM_s[t, m] = QS[t] > 0.0 ? min(Q_s[t, m], Q_s[t, m] * QD[t] / QS[t]) : 0.0
P_clearing[t] = QS[t] >= QD[t] ? (FIT[t] + beta * (ToU[t] - FIT[t])) : (ToU[t] - beta * (ToU[t] - FIT[t]))
Cost_m[t, m] = Q_LEM_b[t, m] * P_clearing[t] + (Q_b[t, m] - Q_LEM_b[t, m]) * ToU[t] + F_m[t, m] * FP_m[t, m]
Rev_m[t, m] = Q_LEM_s[t, m] * P_clearing[t] + (Q_s[t, m] - Q_LEM_s[t, m]) * FIT[t] - F_m[t, m] * FP_m[t, m]
Nett_minus_m[t, m] = max(0.0, load[t, m] - generation[t, m] - rho_m[m] * G_sh[t])
Nett_plus_m[t, m] = max(0.0, generation[t, m] + rho_m[m] * G_sh[t] - load[t, m])
delta_Q_m[t, m] = (Nett_minus_m[t, m] - Q_b[t, m]) - (Nett_plus_m[t, m] - Q_s[t, m])
Cost_settled_m[t, m] = Cost_m[t, m] + (delta_Q_m[t, m] > 0.0 ? delta_Q_m[t, m] * ToU[t] : 0.0)
Rev_settled_m[t, m] = Rev_m[t, m] + (delta_Q_m[t, m] < 0.0 ? abs(delta_Q_m[t, m]) * FIT[t] : 0.0)
Nett_minus_EC[t] = max(0.0, sum(Nett_minus_m[t, :] - Nett_plus_m[t, :]) + C_EC[t] - G_EC[t] - G_sh[t])
Nett_plus_EC[t] = max(0.0, G_EC[t] + G_sh[t] - C_EC[t] - sum(Nett_minus_m[t, :] - Nett_plus_m[t, :]))
VS_EC_t[t] = sum(Cost_settled_m[t, :] - Rev_settled_m[t, :]) - (Nett_minus_EC[t] * ToU[t] - Nett_plus_EC[t] * FIT[t])
EQ_m[t, m] = VS_EC_t[t] / M
delta_Q_minus_sum[t] = sum(delta_Q_m[t, m] for m where delta_Q_m[t, m] > 0.0)
delta_Q_plus_sum[t] = sum(abs(delta_Q_m[t, m]) for m where delta_Q_m[t, m] < 0.0)
q_minus_m[t, m] = (delta_Q_m[t, m] > 0.0 && delta_Q_minus_sum[t] > 0.0) ? delta_Q_m[t, m] / delta_Q_minus_sum[t] : 0.0
q_plus_m[t, m] = (delta_Q_m[t, m] < 0.0 && delta_Q_plus_sum[t] > 0.0) ? abs(delta_Q_m[t, m]) / delta_Q_plus_sum[t] : 0.0
VS_m[t, m] = delta_Q_m[t, m] < 0.0 ? (1.0 + q_plus_m[t, m]) * EQ_m[t, m] : (delta_Q_m[t, m] > 0.0 ? (1.0 - q_minus_m[t, m]) * EQ_m[t, m] : EQ_m[t, m])
Payment_init[t, m] = Cost_settled_m[t, m] - Rev_settled_m[t, m]
Payment_final[t, m] = Payment_init[t, m] - VS_m[t, m]
Cost_final[t, m] = max(0.0, Payment_final[t, m])
Rev_final[t, m] = max(0.0, -Payment_final[t, m])
Payment_no_EC[t, m] = Nett_minus_m[t, m] * ToU[t] - Nett_plus_m[t, m] * FIT[t]
Gain_m[t, m] = Payment_no_EC[t, m] - Payment_final[t, m]
SSI_m[t, m] = load[t, m] > 0.0 ? min(load[t, m], generation[t, m] + G_sh[t] * rho_m[m]) / load[t, m] : 1.0
SCI_m[t, m] = (generation[t, m] + G_sh[t] * rho_m[m]) > 0.0 ? min(load[t, m], generation[t, m] + G_sh[t] * rho_m[m]) / (generation[t, m] + G_sh[t] * rho_m[m]) : 1.0
QI_m[t, m] = Nett_minus_m[t, m] > 0.0 ? Q_b[t, m] / Nett_minus_m[t, m] : (Nett_plus_m[t, m] > 0.0 ? Q_s[t, m] / Nett_plus_m[t, m] : 0.0)
SSI_EC[t] = (sum(load[t, :]) + C_EC[t]) > 0.0 ? min(sum(load[t, :]) + C_EC[t], G_EC[t] + G_sh[t] + sum(generation[t, :])) / (sum(load[t, :]) + C_EC[t]) : 1.0
SCI_EC[t] = (G_EC[t] + G_sh[t] + sum(generation[t, :])) > 0.0 ? min(sum(load[t, :]) + C_EC[t], G_EC[t] + G_sh[t] + sum(generation[t, :])) / (G_EC[t] + G_sh[t] + sum(generation[t, :])) : 1.0
DLS_EC[t] = sum(load[t, :]) > 0.0 ? (sum(min(load[t, m], generation[t, m] + G_sh[t] * rho_m[m]) for m) + sum(Q_b[t, :])) / sum(load[t, :]) : 1.0
x_m[t, m] = (generation[t, m] + G_sh[t] * rho_m[m]) > 0.0 ? VS_m[t, m] / (generation[t, m] + G_sh[t] * rho_m[m]) : 0.0
Cost_0_m[t, m] = D_m[t, m] > 0.0 ? D_m[t, m] * DP_init_m[t, m] : 0.0
Rev_0_m[t, m] = S_m[t, m] > 0.0 ? S_m[t, m] * SP_init_m[t, m] : 0.0

steps.name: Day-ahead Deficit & Surplus Aggregation
pseudocode: Compute member level deficit (D_m) and surplus (S_m)
Aggregate community level deficit (D_EC) and surplus (S_EC)

steps.name: LEM and LFM Setup and Market Matching
pseudocode: Apply deficit or surplus conditional rules to setup bidding parameters (Q_b, Q_s, DP_m, SP_m)
Submit bids to LEM, compute aggregated supply and demand (QD, QS)
Clear market by matching quantities (Q_LEM_b, Q_LEM_s) and set uniform price P_clearing
Determine baseline operational costs (Cost_m) and revenues (Rev_m) before settlement deviation updates

steps.name: Post-trading Settlement and Deviations Updates
pseudocode: Observe actual net-metered values of members (Nett_minus_m, Nett_plus_m)
Calculate structural matching deviations (delta_Q_m)
Update individual payments with penalization/compensation rates for settlement (Cost_settled_m, Rev_settled_m)
Compute aggregate net community exchange vectors (Nett_minus_EC, Nett_plus_EC)

steps.name: Community Value Share Distribution
pseudocode: Calculate total community financial benefit pool VS_EC_t
Define base EQ value distribution EQ_m
Evaluate relative contribution of each member to community net peaks (q_minus_m, q_plus_m)
Apply quota updates to scale value shares VS_m based on system behavior

steps.name: Final Billing Payments Execution
pseudocode: Resolve final net balance payments (Payment_final) by subtracting VS_m from baseline costs
Format output vectors into explicit billing variables (Cost_final, Rev_final)

steps.name: Multi-dimensional KPI Evaluation
pseudocode: Compute baseline metrics mapping counterfactual payment structures (Payment_no_EC)
Calculate financial metrics (Gain_m) and efficiency parameters (SSI_m, SCI_m, QI_m) for members
Derive community metrics (SSI_EC, SCI_EC, DLS_EC) and systemic equity parameters (FI_EC)

steps.name: Day-Ahead Cost/Revenue Calculation
pseudocode: Calculate the day-ahead initial cost before trading (Cost_0_m)
Calculate the day-ahead initial revenue before trading (Rev_0_m)

input_mapping.transformation: Reshape dataframe load columns into 2D matrix (T, M)
Reshape dataframe generation columns into 2D matrix (T, M)

tariff_mapping.alignment: Hourly profile aligned with matching timestamp hour of day
Hourly profile aligned with matching timestamp hour of day

pseudocode: Step 1: Calculate individual deficit D_m = np.maximum(0.0, load - generation - rho_m * G_sh[:, None])
Step 2: Calculate individual surplus S_m = np.maximum(0.0, generation + rho_m * G_sh[:, None] - load)
Step 3: Calculate Cost_0_m = np.where(D_m > 0.0, D_m * DP_init_m, 0.0)
Step 4: Calculate Rev_0_m = np.where(S_m > 0.0, S_m * SP_init_m, 0.0)
Step 5: Calculate aggregated deficit D_EC = np.sum(D_m, axis=1) + C_EC
Step 6: Calculate aggregated surplus S_EC = np.sum(S_m, axis=1) + G_EC + rho_EC * G_sh
Step 7: Create dynamic state mask is_deficit_matrix = (S_EC < D_EC)[:, None]
Step 8: Compute Q_b = np.where(is_deficit_matrix, D_m - F_m, D_m + F_m)
Step 9: Compute Q_s = np.where(is_deficit_matrix, S_m + F_m, S_m - F_m)
Step 10: Compute DP_m using conditional check is_deficit_matrix, fallback to ToU[:, None]
Step 11: Compute SP_m using conditional check is_deficit_matrix, fallback to FIT[:, None]
Step 12: Aggregate demand QD = np.sum(Q_b, axis=1)
Step 13: Aggregate supply QS = np.sum(Q_s, axis=1)
Step 14: Clear quantities on LEM Q_LEM_b = np.where(QD[:, None] > 0.0, np.minimum(Q_b, Q_b * QS[:, None] / QD[:, None]), 0.0)
Step 15: Clear quantities on LEM Q_LEM_s = np.where(QS[:, None] > 0.0, np.minimum(Q_s, Q_s * QD[:, None] / QS[:, None]), 0.0)
Step 16: Compute clearing price P_clearing = np.where(QS >= QD, FIT + beta * (ToU - FIT), ToU - beta * (ToU - FIT))
Step 17: Compute baseline costs Cost_m = Q_LEM_b * P_clearing[:, None] + (Q_b - Q_LEM_b) * ToU[:, None] + F_m * FP_m
Step 18: Compute baseline revenues Rev_m = Q_LEM_s * P_clearing[:, None] + (Q_s - Q_LEM_s) * FIT[:, None] - F_m * FP_m
Step 19: Compute actual net-metered values Nett_minus_m = np.maximum(0.0, load - generation - rho_m * G_sh[:, None])
Step 20: Compute actual net-metered values Nett_plus_m = np.maximum(0.0, generation + rho_m * G_sh[:, None] - load)
Step 21: Calculate delta_Q_m = (Nett_minus_m - Q_b) - (Nett_plus_m - Q_s)
Step 22: Update with deviation Cost_settled_m = Cost_m + np.where(delta_Q_m > 0.0, delta_Q_m * ToU[:, None], 0.0)
Step 23: Update with deviation Rev_settled_m = Rev_m + np.where(delta_Q_m < 0.0, np.abs(delta_Q_m) * FIT[:, None], 0.0)
Step 24: Aggregate EC actual net deficit Nett_minus_EC = np.maximum(0.0, np.sum(Nett_minus_m - Nett_plus_m, axis=1) + C_EC - G_EC - G_sh)
Step 25: Aggregate EC actual net surplus Nett_plus_EC = np.maximum(0.0, G_EC + G_sh - C_EC - np.sum(Nett_minus_m - Nett_plus_m, axis=1))
Step 26: Compute community Value Share pool VS_EC_t = np.sum(Cost_settled_m - Rev_settled_m, axis=1) - (Nett_minus_EC * ToU - Nett_plus_EC * FIT)
Step 27: Base equal share EQ_m = VS_EC_t[:, None] / M
Step 28: Sum positive deviations delta_Q_minus_sum = np.sum(np.where(delta_Q_m > 0.0, delta_Q_m, 0.0), axis=1)
Step 29: Sum negative deviations delta_Q_plus_sum = np.sum(np.where(delta_Q_m < 0.0, np.abs(delta_Q_m), 0.0), axis=1)
Step 30: Proportional share q_minus_m = np.where((delta_Q_m > 0.0) & (delta_Q_minus_sum[:, None] > 0.0), delta_Q_m / delta_Q_minus_sum[:, None], 0.0)
Step 31: Proportional share q_plus_m = np.where((delta_Q_m < 0.0) & (delta_Q_plus_sum[:, None] > 0.0), np.abs(delta_Q_m) / delta_Q_plus_sum[:, None], 0.0)
Step 32: Adjusted Value Share allocation VS_m = np.where(delta_Q_m < 0.0, (1.0 + q_plus_m) * EQ_m, np.where(delta_Q_m > 0.0, (1.0 - q_minus_m) * EQ_m, EQ_m))
Step 33: payment init Payment_init = Cost_settled_m - Rev_settled_m
Step 34: payment final Payment_final = Payment_init - VS_m
Step 35: Cost_final = np.maximum(0.0, Payment_final)
Step 36: Rev_final = np.maximum(0.0, -Payment_final)
Step 37: Compute metrics: Payment_no_EC, Gain_m, SSI_m, SCI_m, QI_m, SSI_EC, SCI_EC, DLS_EC, x_m, FI_EC according to defined symbols
validation_checks: Ensure load and generation inputs are of identical non-empty shape (T, M)
Ensure time series indexes of load, generation, ToU, FIT are fully aligned
Check that total sum of VS_m across members equals VS_EC_t per timestep
Verify that Fairness Index (FI_EC) lies strictly within the range [0.0, 1.0]
Ensure division by zero is avoided when normalizing delta contributions
